system_information.authorization_boundary: Meridian LMS application and supporting infrastructure

fedramp_rules.rule_text: Cloud service providers MUST apply ALL Key Security Indicators to ALL aspects of their cloud service offering that are within the FedRAMP Minimum Assessment Scope.
All parties SHOULD follow FedRAMP's best practices and technical assistance on assessing Key Security Indicators where applicable.
(INTERIM RULE) All parties SHOULD continuously monitor and review materials in the FedRAMP 20x Phase One (20xP1) pilot requirements and the 20x Community Working Group.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Configure ALL information resources to limit inbound and outbound traffic.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Configure all information systems and resources to limit unauthorized or unnecessary inbound and outbound network traffic, thereby reducing the attack surface and preventing data exfiltration or unauthorized access.
ksi_requirements.test_results: PASS - Comprehensive traffic controls across all resources (97%)

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Design systems to minimize the attack surface and minimize lateral movement if compromised.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Design and implement system architectures and configurations that reduce the overall attack surface and limit the ability of adversaries to move laterally within the environment if a compromise occurs.
ksi_requirements.test_results: PASS - Excellent attack surface minimization and lateral movement prevention (85%)

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Use logical networking and related capabilities to enforce traffic flow controls.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement logical network segmentation and associated technologies to enforce strict traffic flow controls between systems, services, and environments.
ksi_requirements.test_results: PASS - Comprehensive logical networking for traffic flow control (106%)

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Use immutable infrastructure with strictly defined functionality and privileges by default.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement infrastructure deployment patterns that prevent runtime modification and enforce consistent, secure configurations.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement container security and orchestration controls.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Ensure container workloads are securely configured, isolated, and managed throughout their lifecycle.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Ensure secure API design and implementation.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement secure API practices including authentication, authorization, input validation, and monitoring.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement cloud-native security monitoring and alerting.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Deploy comprehensive monitoring solutions that provide visibility into cloud infrastructure and application security events.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish and maintain secure configuration baselines.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Define, implement, and maintain secure configuration standards for all system components.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement automated configuration compliance monitoring.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Deploy automated tools to continuously monitor and enforce configuration compliance.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Ensure secure service configuration and hardening.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Apply security hardening configurations to all services and disable unnecessary functionality.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement vulnerability scanning and remediation.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Deploy automated vulnerability scanning and establish remediation processes for identified vulnerabilities.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish secure development and deployment pipelines.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement secure software development lifecycle practices and automated deployment controls.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement secure backup and recovery procedures.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Establish automated backup processes and verify recovery capabilities for critical data and systems.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Ensure secure patch management processes.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement automated patch management and maintain current security patches across all system components.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement comprehensive identity and access management.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Establish centralized identity management with proper authentication and authorization controls.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Enforce multi-factor authentication for all privileged access.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Require multi-factor authentication for all administrative and privileged user accounts.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement role-based access controls and least privilege.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Apply principle of least privilege through role-based access control implementations.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish automated access review and certification processes.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement periodic automated review of user access rights and permissions.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement session management and timeout controls.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Enforce session timeouts and secure session management practices.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Ensure secure credential storage and management.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement secure storage and management of authentication credentials and secrets.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement comprehensive logging and monitoring.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Deploy comprehensive logging capabilities across all system components.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish security event correlation and analysis.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement automated correlation and analysis of security events across systems.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement automated alerting and notification systems.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Deploy automated alerting for security events and system anomalies.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Ensure log integrity and protection.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement controls to protect log integrity and prevent unauthorized modification.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement performance monitoring and capacity management.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Deploy monitoring for system performance and capacity planning.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish log retention and archival policies.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement appropriate log retention periods and secure archival processes.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement configuration management database (CMDB).
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Establish comprehensive inventory and tracking of all system components.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish automated configuration tracking and change detection.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement automated detection and tracking of configuration changes.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement change management and approval processes.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Establish formal change management processes with appropriate approval workflows.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish configuration baseline management.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Define and maintain secure configuration baselines for all system types.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement configuration compliance reporting and remediation.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Establish processes for reporting configuration deviations and implementing corrective actions.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement data classification and handling procedures.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Establish data classification scheme and implement appropriate handling procedures.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish privacy impact assessment processes.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement privacy impact assessment procedures for system changes affecting personal data.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement data minimization and retention controls.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Establish controls to minimize data collection and implement appropriate retention periods.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish consent management and user rights procedures.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement processes for managing user consent and data subject rights.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement data breach notification procedures.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Establish procedures for detecting, assessing, and reporting data breaches.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish cross-border data transfer controls.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement controls for secure cross-border transfer of personal data.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement privacy monitoring and compliance reporting.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Establish ongoing monitoring and reporting of privacy compliance activities.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish third-party risk assessment and management.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement processes for assessing and managing risks from third-party providers.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement supply chain security controls.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Establish controls to ensure supply chain security and integrity.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish vendor security monitoring and oversight.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement ongoing monitoring and oversight of vendor security practices.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement third-party data sharing agreements and controls.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Establish secure controls for data sharing with third-party organizations.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement comprehensive encryption for data at rest.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Ensure all sensitive data at rest is protected using appropriate encryption.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Ensure encryption for data in transit.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement encryption for all data transmission between system components.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement high availability and fault tolerance.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Design and implement systems with appropriate high availability and fault tolerance capabilities.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish disaster recovery and business continuity.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement comprehensive disaster recovery and business continuity procedures.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement performance monitoring and optimization.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Deploy comprehensive performance monitoring and implement optimization procedures.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish capacity planning and scalability controls.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement capacity planning processes and scalability controls for system growth.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish incident response procedures and capabilities.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement comprehensive incident response procedures and maintain response capabilities.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Implement security incident detection and analysis.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Deploy capabilities for detecting, analyzing, and responding to security incidents.

ksi_requirements.requirement_text: Establish incident communication and reporting.
ksi_requirements.assessment_objective: Implement procedures for incident communication, escalation, and external reporting.
